titleStmt.title: SII 8.235: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 235. (A.R. No. 633-A of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The beginning and the end of this inscription cannot be traced on the stone. ga ṇapatiyārkkup potu ney Iruceviṭarai
yāka munṟu potaikkum ney Āḻākke Iruce
viṭaraiyum Āka nāḷ Onṟiṉukku ney nāḻi Āḻākku
kku nāḻi neykku nellut tūṇiyāka vanta
kuṟuṇiyum
ka munṟu potaikku taiyiramutu munnāḻiyum Attayāmattu
kku tayiramutu Uriyumāka tayiramutu munnāḻi Urikku nāḻit tayi
rukku nellu Irunāḻi Uriyāka vanta nellu kuṟuṇi muḻākku
m Ittevarkku Aṭaikkāyamirtu poteṭṭāka muṉṟu potai
kku Aṭaikkāyamirtu Irupattunālum Attacāmattukku Aṭaikkāyamir
tu Āṟum nālu potaikku milaiyamitu Aṟupatumāka Aṭai
kkāyamirtukkum veṟṟilaiamirtumāka nellu munnāḻiyu
m Inta śrīkoyilil Eriyum tirunon=tā viḷakku Āṟukku Eṇṇai
nāḻi Uriyum cantiviḷakku ciṟukālaicanti viḷakku patināṟum Uccam
potaikku viḷakku patināṟum Iravusa[ ndi] viḷakku Irupatteṭṭum Āka cantiviḷakku Aṟupatukku Eṇṇai nāḻi Uriyum śrīpalikku
Eriyum piṭiviḷakku ciṟukālaikku Onṟum Ucciyampotaikku Onṟum
Iravaikku Iraṇṭum Āka śrīpalikku munṟu cantikku Eriyum piṭivi
ḷakku Āka nālum pūtapalikku viḷakku Onṟumāka viḷakku Aiñcukku Eṇ
ṇai Uḻakku Āka Eṇṇai munnāḻi Uḻakkukku . nāḻi Eṇṇaikku nellu
t tūṇiyāka Eṇṇai munnāḻi Uḻakkukku nellu kalane kuṟu
ṇiyum . Ittevarkku caniyum putaṉum cātta Eṇṇaikkāppukku
nāḷāl Eṇṇai yirupiṭiyāka kiḻamaikku Eṇṇai Uḻakku
nāl Eṇṇai kku niccam nellu Irunāḻiyum . In�
potaraip palamāka Oru pa
llu nāḻiyum . tirumeyppūccukku cantaṇam muṉṟu �
māka Araippalattukku nellu nānāḻiyum . citāri potuk kaḻa
ñcāka munṟu potaikkum mukkaḻañcukku nellu munnāḻi
yum . ga ṇapatiyā(ā)rkku Appaamitukku carkkarai Orupalattukku niccam
muḻākkum Ittevarai tiruvārātiṉaiceyum brāhma ṇaṉ Oruva
nukku nicatam nellu patakkum . tirumañcananī raṭṭiyum tiruviḷakku
t tūṇṭiyum parivāram Ārāticcum tiruamir tiṭṭum tirumeni
ṭiccum maṟṟum Iśrīkoyilukku veṇṭum paṇi ce
yum māṇikaḷ nālvarkku perāl kuṟuṇiyāka ṉālvaṟku nellu tūṇi .
tirupaḷḷittāmam paṟittu toṭuppānukku nicatam nellu Aṟunāḻiyum .
tiruppatiyam pāṭuvār Iruvaṟkku nittam
nellup patak kirunāḻiyum . tiruviḷakku tirume
ḻukkiṭṭu ninmāniyanir pokaṭṭuvār Iruvaṟ
ku perāl nitta nellu nānāḻiyāka nel
lu kuṟuṇi . Ikkoyillukku śrīkāriyamā
rāyvāṉukku nitta nelluk kuṟuṇiyum . ti
rukkuṭamukkil mulaparaṭaiyār koyil vāriya
vā(n) noruvanukku nellu
k kuṟuṇi kuṭamukkil mulaparaṭaiyar
kkāy Inta śrīkoyi(l)lukku śrīpaṇ
ṭāramceyyum brāhma ṇa(n) noruvanukku
nittam nellup patakkum . Uḷttirumey
kākkum � nnoruvanukku nitta nellukku kuṟu
ṇiyum . puṟattirumeykākkum talaivāyanukku nit
tam Oruvaṉukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum . ṉāḷuḻamuttam
colluvārkku In=ta śrīkoyilil nitta nellu mun
nāḻiyum . tirunan=ta vānam Iṟaikkum tirunan=ta tavānakku
ṭiyaḷukku nittam perāl nelluk kuṟuṇi
yāka nitta nellup patakkumThe inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 8.235 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
